description: Returns the version-specific settings of a Lambda function or version.

unverifiedMitreAttackTechniques.technique: T1552.001 - Unsecured Credentials: Credentials In Files
unverifiedMitreAttackTechniques.reason: GetFunctionConfiguration exposes environment variables which may contain hardcoded credentials, API keys, or database connection strings.
Reveals detailed function configuration including VPC settings, IAM roles, and runtime environment, aiding in infrastructure mapping.

securityImplications: Attackers might use GetFunctionConfiguration to inspect Lambda function settings, environment variables, and attached IAM roles to extract credentials or plan privilege escalation.
